brand.name: DHS MEDIA
brand.tagline: Kho tool ho tro automation va reup video

hero.title: TOOL DANG BAN
hero.description: Tong hop cac phan mem ho tro cao video, xu ly video, voice, render va quan ly noi dung. Chon tool phu hop, xem huong dan va lien he admin de kich hoat ban quyen.

apps.name: DHS MEDIA REUP TOOL
apps.tagline: Cao TikTok Viet, xu ly video, voice/TTS, preset va hang doi
apps.description: Phan mem desktop ho tro nguoi ban hang tao video reup nhanh hon voi bo cong cu loc video, cat ghep, voice, subtitle, overlay va render CPU/GPU.
features: Cao TikTok Viet theo san pham
Loc dung san pham va khong trung kenh
Tao voice/TTS va tu dong khop video
Cat ghep, overlay, subtitle, che mat
Preset cau hinh va hang doi

apps.name: REUP KEY
apps.tagline: Quan ly key va kich hoat app cho khach hang
apps.description: Bo cong cu ho tro quan ly ban quyen, cap key, theo doi may kich hoat va ho tro ban giao app cho nguoi dung.
features: Tao va quan ly license key
Theo doi thiet bi kich hoat
Phu hop ban app cho nhieu khach

apps.name: REUP AUTO
apps.tagline: Theo doi nguon video va tu dong xu ly hang loat
apps.description: Goi automation nang cao cho nguoi can theo doi nguon, xu ly video va nhan thong bao khi co noi dung moi.
features: Tu dong tai va xu ly

demos.title: Huong dan su dung DHS MEDIA REUP TOOL
demos.description: Gan link YouTube/TikTok hoac upload video demo trong admin.

faq.question: Mua xong nhan app nhu the nao?
faq.answer: Sau khi lien he admin va thanh toan, ban se nhan file cai dat va key kich hoat.

faq.question: Co the them nhieu tool tren web khong?
faq.answer: Co. Chi can them san pham trong data/site.json hoac trang admin local.
